sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 82:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 82:1
items.html: Their levels equalize with one another and they are back-to-back by the refinement of the coarseness and the turning of the anterior downward. (Inner Light, Item‎ 35)
